version.author: atmosfar
version.changelog: v0.2 - Added SetupMulticamTrack() and SetupVideoProcessor() to automate project structuring.

version.author: atmosfar
version.changelog: v0.3 - Added JS API function check, and second run check, TCP param controls. v0.2 - Added SetupMulticamTrack() and SetupVideoProcessor() to automate project structuring.

version.author: atmosfar
version.changelog: v0.32 - Add guard for mouse clicks during Program Output display mode v0.31 - Remove Active Angle from TCP param controls and revert env automation mode to default. v0.3 - Added JS API function check, and second run check, TCP param controls. v0.2 - Added SetupMulticamTrack() and SetupVideoProcessor() to automate project structuring.

version.author: atmosfar
version.changelog: v0.33 - Update description v0.32 - Add guard for mouse clicks during Program Output display mode v0.31 - Remove Active Angle from TCP param controls and revert env automation mode to default. v0.3 - Added JS API function check, and second run check, TCP param controls. v0.2 - Added SetupMulticamTrack() and SetupVideoProcessor() to automate project structuring.

reapack.name: atmosfar_Render Audio and Remux Video.lua
reapack.desc: atmosfar - Render audio and remux video
